phases.name: Project Foundation
phases.description: Set up development environment and project structure.

milestones.title: Repository and Tooling Setup
milestones.description: Initialize repository and configure development tooling.

tasks.title: Initialize Turborepo monorepo structure
tasks.purpose: Turborepo organizes multiple apps and shared packages in a single repository.

tasks.title: Configure ESLint and Prettier for code quality
tasks.purpose: Ensures consistent code style and catches common errors early.

tasks.title: Set up environment variable management
tasks.purpose: Centralized environment variables help maintain consistent configuration across environments.

milestones.title: Database Initialization
milestones.description: Prepare the database and schema management.

tasks.title: Install Prisma ORM for database management
tasks.purpose: Prisma provides type-safe database access and schema management.

tasks.title: Initialize Prisma schema and migration setup
tasks.purpose: Initializes database schema and migration workflow.

tasks.title: Create database models for users and messages
tasks.purpose: Defines the core data structures for the messaging platform.

milestones.title: Frontend Base Setup
milestones.description: Prepare UI framework and styling configuration.

tasks.title: Install Tailwind CSS for styling
tasks.purpose: Tailwind CSS provides utility-first styling for rapid UI development.

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind CSS project settings
tasks.purpose: Enables Tailwind to scan project files and generate styles.

tasks.title: Create base layout and navigation structure
tasks.purpose: Establishes the foundational UI layout for the application.

phases.name: Messaging Core Development
phases.description: Build the core real-time messaging functionality.

tasks.title: Install Socket.io for real-time communication
tasks.purpose: Socket.io enables bi-directional communication between client and server.

tasks.title: Create WebSocket server for chat communication
tasks.purpose: Handles real-time message broadcasting between users.

tasks.title: Implement room-based messaging channels
tasks.purpose: Allows users to communicate within specific channels or groups.

milestones.title: Message Persistence
milestones.description: Store messages and retrieve chat history.

tasks.title: Create database schema for chat messages
tasks.purpose: Defines how chat messages are stored in the database.

tasks.title: Build API endpoint to store incoming messages
tasks.purpose: Ensures messages are persisted for later retrieval.

tasks.title: Implement chat history retrieval API
tasks.purpose: Allows users to view past conversations.

tasks.title: Design chat message UI components
tasks.purpose: Provides a visually structured message display interface.

tasks.title: Implement message sending functionality
tasks.purpose: Allows users to send messages in real time.

tasks.title: Display real-time incoming messages in UI
tasks.purpose: Ensures new messages appear instantly without page reload.

phases.name: Deployment and Testing
phases.description: Prepare the system for production deployment.

milestones.title: Application Testing
milestones.description: Verify functionality through automated and manual tests.

tasks.title: Install Jest testing framework
tasks.purpose: Provides automated testing capabilities for application logic.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for message API endpoints
tasks.purpose: Ensures message APIs behave correctly.

tasks.title: Perform manual testing of chat functionality
tasks.purpose: Validates the complete messaging workflow.

milestones.title: Production Deployment
milestones.description: Deploy the application to production environment.

tasks.title: Prepare environment variables for production
tasks.purpose: Ensures correct configuration for production services.

tasks.title: Deploy frontend application to Vercel
tasks.purpose: Hosts the frontend application for public access.

tasks.title: Deploy backend services to cloud server
tasks.purpose: Ensures backend APIs are accessible to users.

tasks.title: Integrate Sentry for error monitoring
tasks.purpose: Tracks application errors and performance issues.

tasks.title: Configure logging for backend services
tasks.purpose: Provides insight into server activity and debugging.

tasks.title: Set up uptime monitoring alerts
tasks.purpose: Ensures application availability is monitored.
